relationships.context: The capability-registry build starts by utilizing the ORCHESTRATOR_MONITOR
The ORCHESTRATOR_MONITOR runs Worker 1 for schema and scaffolding
The ORCHESTRATOR_MONITOR runs Worker 2 for integrations inventory
The ORCHESTRATOR_MONITOR runs Worker 3 for internal systems
The ORCHESTRATOR_MONITOR runs Worker 4 for workflows and agents
The ORCHESTRATOR_MONITOR runs Worker 5 for conversation-end integration
Worker 5 closes the loop through the Close Conversation protocol
